tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows hypoglycemia, low HbA1c, elevated creatinine, and significant proteinuria, suggesting possible renal impairment. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal odor, low specific gravity, glucosuria, ketonuria, and bilirubinuria) further support renal dysfunction and possible metabolic derangement. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Clinical correlation and further nephrological and metabolic evaluation are recommended.

display.value: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
